headline: A compact command center for the Royals season

latest_prospect_update.name: Blake Mitchell
latest_prospect_update.note: Most obvious remaining minor-league prospect to track; catcher development and power/patience are the main signals. Recent line: .143 / .455 / .190.

nightly_recap: The Royals lost to the New York Yankees, KC 0, NYY 7. Noah Cameron led the night, working 5.0 innings with 2 earned runs, 4 strikeouts and 1 walk. Maikel Garcia supplied the loudest Royals contact at 105.4 mph.

player_of_game.name: Noah Cameron
player_of_game.reason: worked 5.0 innings with 2 earned runs, 4 strikeouts and 1 walk.
